---
title: "Spring Semester Goals"
author: "Lucy K. Brennan"
date: 2026-03-03
categories: [goals, daily-entries]
description: "Spring 2026 Goals"
image: ""
---

# Overview

Spring 2026 goals

## Goals

### Writing and Manuscripts 

1. Develop lab notebook entry writing skills 
2. Begin draft of Heliophrya life cycle figure and paper

### Analysis and Benchwork

1. Be able to identify different life stages of ciliates during microscopy 
2. Capture different stages on slides I make

### Funding

1. ~~Submit Charles Center Proposal~~

### Other

1. Set up digital notebook

# Primary Skill Building

- [ ] Nicer microscopy slides
- [ ] Practice imaging of created slides
- [ ] maintain a healthy and "clean" culture
